caveats: Grouping is on participant_id ALONE. 20 of 42 participants appear in both the 2022 and 2024 study intervals; splitting on (participant, interval) would leak the same person across splits.
42 participants is a small cohort. A ~8-participant test split yields wide intervals; report per-participant results, not only pooled day-level means.
Normalization statistics must be fitted on training participants only — see fit_normalization_stats().
The test split is evaluated once. Selecting a model against it would make the reported number an in-sample estimate.
